slides: Hook slide: Maya holding up two identical-looking crop tops, text 'One is Rs 3000. One is Rs 300. Can you tell?'
Round 1 — Crop tops: Zara ribbed crop top Rs 2499 vs market ribbed crop top Rs 250. Close-up texture comparison.
Round 2 — Wide-leg pants: Zara linen trousers Rs 3990 vs market linen trousers Rs 500. Maya wearing both, back to back.
Round 3 — Gold earrings: Zara statement earrings Rs 1290 vs Hill Road earrings Rs 150. Detail shots, nearly identical.
Round 4 — Tote bag: Zara canvas tote Rs 1990 vs Linking Road canvas tote Rs 200. Side-by-side flat lay.
Final slide: Full outfit comparison — Zara total Rs 9769 vs Market total Rs 1100. Text: 'Your move, Zara girls.'

posts.topic: Office-to-party transition — 1 outfit, 2 vibes
posts.caption:
9 AM: corporate. 9 PM: dangerous.
Same outfit. Different energy. Different accessories. That's the cheat code nobody teaches you.
Are you an office girlie or a party girlie? Wrong answer: both.
Send this to your work bestie who changes outfits in the office bathroom.
posts.alt_text: Maya Varma showing the same black blazer dress styled two ways — corporate with pumps for day, edgy with boots and bold jewelry for night.
posts.youtube_title: Office to Party: 1 Outfit, 2 Completely Different Vibes
posts.notes: Transition reel. Split-screen or dramatic outfit switch. Day lighting vs moody night lighting. Accessories swap is the key visual moment. | generated_by=viral-claude

posts.topic: College capsule wardrobe — 10 pieces, 30 outfits
posts.caption:
10 pieces. 30 outfits. Zero repeats.
Your hostel closet is tiny. Your budget is tinier. But your style doesn't have to be.
How many outfits can YOU make from 10 pieces? Count and comment.
Save this if you're heading to college this year.
posts.alt_text: Maya Varma surrounded by 10 clothing pieces laid out flat, with multiple styled outfit combinations shown in a grid format.
posts.youtube_title: College Capsule Wardrobe: 10 Pieces = 30 Outfits (Budget Friendly)
posts.notes: Educational carousel. Flat-lay of all 10 pieces, then outfit combinations. Clean white/neutral background. Numbered outfits for easy reference. High save potential. | generated_by=viral-claude
slides: Hook slide: Maya next to a tiny hostel closet, text '10 pieces. 30 outfits. Your hostel closet is enough.'
The 10 Pieces: Flat lay — white tee, black jeans, blue denim, white shirt, cotton kurta, black blazer, floral skirt, neutral co-ord top, co-ord bottom, denim jacket.
Outfits 1-6: Grid of 6 combinations. Casual college looks — jeans + tee, kurta + denim, blazer + skirt, etc.
Outfits 7-12: Grid of 6 combinations. Going-out looks — blazer + skirt, co-ord set, shirt dress style.
Outfits 13-18: Grid of 6 combinations. Mix-and-match Indo-western looks — kurta + jeans, dupatta styling.
Final slide: All 30 combinations in a mini grid, text 'No more 'I have nothing to wear.' You're welcome.'

posts.topic: Diwali outfit that costs less than your gift budget
posts.caption:
You'll spend Rs 5000 on Diwali gifts but cry about spending Rs 2000 on your outfit. Make it make sense.
This Diwali look costs less than your mithai box and hits harder than every lehenga at the party.
What's your Diwali outfit budget? Be honest.
Tag the friend whose Diwali outfit is always an afterthought.
posts.alt_text: Maya Varma in a stunning affordable Diwali outfit under Rs 2000 featuring a modern draped kurta with gold accessories and warm festive lighting.
posts.youtube_title: Diwali Outfit Under Rs 2000 That Outshines Every Lehenga
posts.notes: CONTROVERSY POST. Festive vibes, warm diya-lit background. Single dramatic outfit reveal. Compare cost to typical Diwali spending. Provocative hook drives saves and shares. | generated_by=viral-claude

posts.topic: Rs 500 outfit vs Rs 5000 outfit — budget vs splurge comparison
posts.caption:
Rs 500 outfit vs Rs 5000 outfit. Same girl. Same confidence. Different bank balance.
The internet will tell you style costs money. I'm here to tell you that's a lie.
Which one looks more expensive? Be brutally honest.
Send this to every girl who thinks she needs to spend more to look better.
posts.alt_text: Maya Varma in a side-by-side comparison wearing a Rs 500 budget outfit and a Rs 5000 splurge outfit, both looking equally styled and confident.
posts.youtube_title: Rs 500 vs Rs 5000 Outfit: Can You Tell The Difference?
posts.notes: Hook-photo reel. Budget vs splurge side-by-side. First photo = Rs 500 look (thrifted crop top, market jeans, oxidized earrings). Second photo = Rs 5000 look (Zara top, branded jeans, gold earrings). Reveal that both look fire. High share potential. | generated_by=viral-claude
slides: Photo 1: Maya in Rs 500 outfit — thrifted white crop top, street market blue jeans, oxidized silver earrings, kolhapuri chappals. Full body, confident pose on a colorful Bandra street. Natural sunlight.
Photo 2: Maya in Rs 5000 outfit — Zara fitted white blouse, branded straight-leg denim, gold layered necklace, block heels. Same street, same pose, same confidence. Natural sunlight.
Photo 3: Split comparison — both outfits side by side, price tags overlaid. Maya shrugging with a smirk. Text: 'Style isn't a price tag.'

posts.topic: What I ordered vs What I got — thrift edition
posts.caption:
Ordered the Pinterest vision. Got the Mumbai thrift version.
Plot twist: the thrift version actually ate.
Have you had a thrift win or a thrift disaster? Spill below.
Send to your friend who's scared of thrifting.
posts.alt_text: Maya Varma showing a Pinterest inspiration image next to her thrifted Mumbai version of the same outfit, looking equally stylish.
posts.youtube_title: What I Ordered vs What I Got: Mumbai Thrift Edition (Honest Review)
posts.notes: Hook-photo reel. Expectation vs reality format but with a positive twist — thrift version wins. Photo 1 = Pinterest inspo screenshot aesthetic. Photo 2 = Maya in the thrifted recreation. | generated_by=viral-claude
slides: Photo 1: 'The Pinterest inspo' — a clean, aspirational outfit flat-lay in soft tones. Beige linen co-ord set, gold minimalist jewelry, woven bag. Aesthetic, curated, expensive-looking mood board style.

Photo 2: 'What I got from Linking Road' — Maya wearing a nearly identical thrifted beige linen co-ord, market-bought gold hoops, canvas tote. Full body pose at a Mumbai cafe. Bright, real, unfiltered but gorgeous.
Photo 3: Side-by-side reveal — Pinterest inspo vs Maya's thrift version. Price comparison overlay: Inspo estimated Rs 8000+ vs Thrift total Rs 900. Maya winking at camera.
